name: Jasper AI
notes: GPT wrapper disrupted by underlying model provider. Peak $1.5B valuation. Strong affiliate marketing but no defensible moat.

name: Stability AI
notes: Open-source AI image generation pioneer. Massive community but couldn't monetize. Valuation dropped from $1B+ to distressed.

name: Inflection AI (Pi)
notes: Personal AI chatbot by ex-DeepMind founders. No clear revenue model. Microsoft absorbed team and technology, product discontinued.

name: Juicero
notes: WiFi-connected juicer with proprietary packs. $399 machine destroyed by Bloomberg hand-squeeze video. $120M raised, zero value.

name: Quibi
notes: Short-form premium mobile streaming. $1.75B raised, dead in 6 months. Worst timing: launched during COVID when people watch TV, not phones.

name: Pebble
notes: E-paper smartwatch pioneer. Apple Watch launched April 2015, crushed competition. Acquired by Fitbit for $23M vs $740M peak (97% destruction).

name: Character.ai
notes: AI character chatbot platform. Massive engagement but no monetization. Co-founders and 30 key researchers left for Google in reverse acqui-hire.

name: Meta Galactica
notes: Scientific LLM trained on research papers. Lived 3 days as public demo. Hallucinated scientific citations destroyed trust.

name: Meta BlenderBot 3
notes: 175B parameter conversational AI research demo. Produced offensive responses. Shut down May 2024, never became a product.

name: Amazon CodeWhisperer
notes: AI coding assistant integrated with AWS. Couldn't compete with GitHub Copilot. Folded into Amazon Q Developer and sunset.

name: Jawbone
notes: Wearable fitness tracker pioneer. Quality issues + Fitbit and Apple Watch dominated. Raised $930M+ and still filed for liquidation.

name: WeWork
notes: Co-working space disrupted commercial real estate. $47B peak valuation to Chapter 11 bankruptcy with $19B in lease obligations.

name: Zenefits
notes: HR SaaS platform for benefits and payroll. Regulatory scandal with fake insurance licenses. $4.5B to $350M acquisition (92% destruction).

name: Google Stadia
notes: Cloud gaming platform with impressive streaming tech. Limited game library, Google's kill-product reputation undermined trust. Full refunds on shutdown.

name: Clubhouse
notes: Audio social networking app. $4B valuation in 2021. Twitter Spaces, Spotify Greenroom copied format. Downloads plummeted, effectively dead by 2024.

name: Humane AI Pin
notes: Laser-projected display wearable AI device. $699 + $24/month. Only ~10K units sold. Poster child for AI hardware hype overpromising.

name: Rabbit R1
notes: AI device with Large Action Model concept. $199 price point. CES 2024 hype to disappointing reality. Alongside Humane AI Pin as AI hardware cautionary tale.

name: Arc Browser
notes: Radically redesigned browser. Critical acclaim from tech press, passionate niche community. Sub-1% market share. Pivoted to new browser 'Dia'.

name: Vine
notes: Invented 6-second looping video format. Acquired by Twitter pre-launch. Twitter failed to monetize or invest. TikTok later dominated the format Vine invented.

name: Mozilla Boot to Gecko (Firefox OS)
notes: HTML5-based mobile OS for budget smartphones. Android dominated emerging markets with Google services. Last GitHub commits in 2021.
